effect_cn: 每当你需要使用或打出一张【闪】时，你可以进行一次判定。若判定结果为红色，视为你使用或打出了一张【闪】。
effect_en: Whenever you need to use or play a [Dodge], you may perform a Judgment. If the result is Red (Hearts or Diamonds), it is treated as if you used or played a [Dodge].

faq.q_cn: 如果判定结果是黑色，我还能从手牌打出【闪】吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。判定失败不影响你正常出【闪】。
faq.q_en: If the Judgment fails, can I still play a [Dodge] from my hand?
faq.a_en: Yes. A failed judgment does not prevent you from playing a [Dodge] normally.

faq.q_cn: 张角可以用技能修改八卦阵的判定吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。所有具备修改判定技能的武将都可以影响八卦阵的判定结果。
faq.q_en: Can judgment-altering skills affect Eight Trigrams?
faq.a_en: Yes. Any skill that modifies judgment results can affect Eight Trigrams Array.
